title: Another Liquid Milk
description: Another mod to add placeable milk.
body:
This mod is pretty simple, it allows you to place milk down just like water.

The mod has a config option to allow clearing of effects by swimming in the fluid milk.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
